summary_one_line: A DTD that defaults an unprefixed xmlns attribute (ATTLIST default namespace decl), reached only after the start-tag and DTD parse fully.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed XML document with a DOCTYPE/DTD that declares an attribute defaulting an unprefixed 'xmlns' (default-namespace) attribute via ATTLIST, so the defaulting loop at L9626 produces an entry whose attname == ctxt->str_xmlns and aprefix == NULL, taking the true branch at L9633.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winner seed (value_profile_cmplog trial 3) carries a '<?xml version="1.0"?>' prolog followed by '<!DOCTYPE a SYSTEM "dtds/1' — a syntactically valid document with a DTD reference, so the parser advances past xmlParseStartTag2's attribute loop into the attsDefault loop and hits the xmlns-default arm 3 times (W T=3 at L9633).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The loser seeds never reach the true branch: one loser carries a structurally similar prolog+DOCTYPE but the run produces only the false side / earlier arms (L T=0 F=8 at L9633, and the aprefix==str_xmlns arm L9648 fires T=5 F=3 instead), while the other loser is malformed nested '<a>'/'<b>' tag soup with no DTD defaulting at all, so xmlParseStartTag2 stalls in the attribute scan and never builds an xmlns-default entry.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback. The intervening literal comparisons in the prolog/DTD ('<?xml', 'version', DOCTYPE keyword, the str_xmlns dictionary pointer compare) are exact-equality gates; I2SRandReplace splices the logged comparand bytes directly into the input so the document parses far enough to populate attsDefault and reach the L9633 xmlns-default true branch. value_profile (loser) lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets prefix-distance gradient buckets, which do not synthesize the exact byte sequences needed to clear the structural gates.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true branch of the xmlns-default test inside the attribute-defaulting loop of xmlParseStartTag2.
The blocker sits in the attributes-defaulting block driven by ctxt->attsDefault, not the live attribute scan.
Only the winner takes the true side of the blocker; the loser takes only the false side or never reaches it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L9633  T=3 F=0  T=0 F=8  if ((attname == ctxt->str_xmlns) && (aprefix == NULL)) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The winner seed contains a valid XML prolog and a DOCTYPE/DTD reference enabling the defaulting path.
In the loser run the defaulting loop diverts to the aprefix==str_xmlns arm rather than the xmlns-default arm.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L9648  T=0 F=0  T=5 F=3  } else if (aprefix == ctxt->str_xmlns) {

evidence_trail.claim: The winner is value_profile_cmplog and the loser is value_profile, differing by the I2S technique.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace; value_profile does not have it.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc plus token stack.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 6740 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 3 --seed fc953d92fc9cf938` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 3 and depth 4 of the ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current vpc build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only structural gate is a DTD ATTLIST defaulting an unprefixed xmlns where value_profile resolves the L9633 true branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing the gate clears on CMP_MAP gradient alone without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The second loser seed is malformed tag-soup with no DTD, so the contrast partly reflects a missing DTD rather than purely the absence of an xmlns-defaulting ATTLIST entry, weakening the single-feature attribution.
